    • getValueAsBoolean

      public Boolean getValueAsBoolean(int index) throws MethodNotImplementedException
      Overrides:
      getValueAsBoolean in class WffBMArray
      Parameters:
      index - the index to get the value as Boolean.
      Returns:
      nothing, it always throws exception as converting a number to boolean doesn't make sense.
      Throws:
      MethodNotImplementedException - converting a number to a boolean doesn't make sense.
      Since:
      12.0.3
